profile.name: Fran Rom
profile.title: Frontend Engineer | Web3 & AI
profile.summary: Frontend Lead Engineer with 8+ years of experience building Web3 products and leading engineering teams. Passionate about the intersection of blockchain and AI — from building onchain dapps to integrating AI-powered features like natural language interfaces and autonomous agents into real products. Stack includes TypeScript, React, Next.js, wagmi, viem, Solana, and EVM integrations, as well as AI tooling and agentic workflows.

experience.description: Led frontend engineering for a Web3 gaming platform, building tools and dapps for game developers.
highlights: Built and led a team of 3 frontend engineers to deliver a multitenant questing platform with NFTs and a progression system
Evolved the platform from PaaS to SaaS model, including auth layer, billing integration, and tenant isolation
Architected and developed Web3 tools and prototypes using Next.js, Vite, wagmi, and viem — including crypto games, game developer tooling, and onchain dashboards
Integrated AI-powered features to improve dapp usability: natural language interfaces, AI agents, and in-app action execution via chat

experience.description: R&D team building Web3 prototypes for a leading crypto media company.
highlights: Part of the Research & Development team
Created Web3-based prototypes

experience.description: Built dapps and NFT collections across EVM and Solana ecosystems.
highlights: NFT collection development on EVM & Solana
Dapps development with NFTs, gaming, staking, and farming features
DeFi platform development

experience.description: Built DeFi platform interfaces with blockchain data integration.
highlights: Created and maintained Subgraph from blockchain data using The Graph
Built Defi.finance v2 platform

experience.description: Led frontend development for a DAO building Yield DeFi projects.

Used coding standards from Pancakeswap and Beefy
Successfully deployed to mainnet

Built components library with Storybook
Ensured cross-platform optimization for mobile phones

API calls with Apollo Client and GraphQL

Agile SCRUM methodology

More than 30 projects developed

Custom content management systems on demand
